name: CorpusWire
description: CorpusWire retrieval, prompt enhancement, and OpenClaw context-engine adapter.

basicAuth.label: Basic Auth
basicAuth.help: Optional username:password for CorpusWire Basic Auth. Prefer CORPUSWIRE_BASIC_AUTH.

repoPath.label: Repository Path
repoPath.help: Optional service-local repository root used for repo-scoped retrieval.

workspaceId.label: Workspace ID
workspaceId.help: Optional remote workspace id used for remote-indexed retrieval.

autoContext.label: Compatibility Auto Context
autoContext.help: Inject retrieved context through before_prompt_build. Leave off when using the contextEngine slot.

contextEngineAutoContext.label: CorpusWire Auto Context
contextEngineAutoContext.help: Inject retrieved context when this plugin owns OpenClaw's contextEngine slot.
